c.d: Ability of the app to compare prices from multiple retailers or sellers accurately
Number and quality of available coupons, promo codes, and discounts for various items
Average user rating scores on app stores reflecting user satisfaction and reliability
Availability of the app on multiple platforms such as iOS, Android, and web
Features such as barcode scanning, price drop alerts, local store price checks, and cashback offers
User interface simplicity and speed of accessing deals and offers
